bc0d015d-dca6-d3ee-1468-f763cb24ec8a.description: This experiment covers all of the updates to the Rewards page on Console for 2606: new progress bar, new point total in top-nav, removing unclaimed points from claim button, new benefits button

6710fb82-94eb-d4fa-b374-0ea0cbd7e4af.description: We are surfacing targetd offers on PC. Whenever a game has a targeted offer that is the lowest price, it shows that price along with the "For You" badge.

1520326c-8a8a-8125-5198-df22b4ccb3f6.description: This effort will test a placement for Rewards on Griffin Home, based on a Fresno banner. Our hypothesis is that this will grow Rewards engagement.

02a19177-84f5-b674-193b-04b4e24a7f4f.description: Manage incremental rollout of UCS -> GCS transition for Optional Data Collection (ODC) Consent UX on Xbox Console

4650dc8f-360d-f1ed-5444-e209424f3f83.displayName: [Gamebar] Gaming Copilot PTT Upsell and Voice Teaching Tips
4650dc8f-360d-f1ed-5444-e209424f3f83.description: This is an experiment to enable the PTT upsell text and teaching tips in order to see if the effort increases the user engagement with voice mode and push to talk, then help increase the retention rate.

142670bf-2107-67c7-b4aa-1f3cba49f479.displayName: [Gamebar] Gaming Copilot FRE Enhanced Welcome Flow
142670bf-2107-67c7-b4aa-1f3cba49f479.description: The experiment will enable a new welcome flow with three pages educating the user of Gaming Copilot functionality. We would like to have a redesign on the onboarding flow for PC to see if it will first-session usage and PTT adoption by teaching the gaming use case upfront.

795e4ec9-4261-ccca-97ae-e2c37373d41b.displayName: [Console] Enable a new Rewards entry point on Console Home
795e4ec9-4261-ccca-97ae-e2c37373d41b.description: This experiment will test a new entry point for the Rewards page (aka Hub) on Console. Users in treatment will see a new button on their Console that tracks their point balance and when selected opens their Rewards Hub.

c9f4b06b-40f5-9b69-1836-b0cd7098941a.description: adding top wishlisted games channel onto store

a21fdb57-48af-ee91-3d7e-3195bc22eac5.displayName: Gamebar: Switch Search Requests to Celadon
a21fdb57-48af-ee91-3d7e-3195bc22eac5.description: Testing out latency of a new search path - using Celadon to hydrate Search Results

3fc42ab0-1159-17ba-c899-bb5be5fbb3cc.displayName: Quality Control Experiment V2: 30D vs 15D Weighted Scores
3fc42ab0-1159-17ba-c899-bb5be5fbb3cc.description: This experiment is a continuation of the previous experiment where we introduced Quality Control Weighting to the Search Relevancy Algorithm. This time, we will be testing 2 different weights on 2 different grace periods (30D vs 15D) of data to see the impact of stronger weighting and the presentation of those results. Products marked as "visible" will receive a Search relevancy boost to their overall ranked score. At RT, this means that products considered low quality will go down in the order shown to players (i.e. poor quality games will end up behind/underneath products that have met threshold requirements outlined by the QC stream.)

3ed414b7-11c3-d013-351a-f7d0f1939d52.displayName: [Console] Launch the Rewards Hub via a standalone page
3ed414b7-11c3-d013-351a-f7d0f1939d52.description: This experiment tests the change of Rewards as a standalone page rather than within Profile. We're testing that no negative impact to Rewards engagement, console engagement or other guard rail metrics can be measured from this.

65baedae-a001-0ecf-315b-68805b71ec2b.description: V1: If we change the order of the SKUs/plans in the Subscription Plan Picker, then Premium Acquisitions will increase because we are leading with the more affordable mid-tier option (Treatment 2). There will also be a version with Ultimate in the lead position (Treatment 1), which is the highest value option. V2: Focusing on Ultimate displayed first instead of Premium.

62d608a3-c7e9-796a-33a4-e2c07afcface.description: This feature tests a change to the Play Jewel quest in Griffin in which treatment will have an additional "Claim all points" button in the details page, rather than having to exit to claim. 6a77eb05-f9fc-1585-00b3-dfea971ff58e.displayName: XboxCom | Comparing Default Search Relevancy to new combined PC/Console based Search Relevancy
6a77eb05-f9fc-1585-00b3-dfea971ff58e.description: We are seeking to compare the default search relevancy algorithm which only uses console engagement data for scoring/ranking search results with our new Console/PC Engagement scoring algorithm to track performance and CTR for search results. Before this change, PC games were not given a true relevancy score and often sorted below Console games. By performing this experiment on Xbox.com (which has started to show console games for xCloud) we will provide a more relevant search and discovery experience for our players.
